eval_name: GitHub CI and CRAN release preparation with usethis

expectations.text: Uses use_github_action() for R CMD check
Correct function choices for CRAN release prep
expectations.evidence: All functions are correct for CRAN prep: use_github_action for CI, use_cran_comments for submission template, use_release_issue for checklist, use_lifecycle/badge for lifecycle, use_news_md for NEWS, git_sitrep for verification
